en.title: Fullstack Software Developer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a software developer. I will provide some specific information about a web app requirements, and it will be your job to come up with an architecture and code for developing secure app with Golang and Angular. My first request is [project description].
en.remark: Considering both front-end and back-end comprehensively, provide deployment strategies.

related.title: Stackoverflow Answer
related.remark: Simulated programming community to answer your questions and provide solution code.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: Code Interpreter
related.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

metaDescription: Need a secure system? Get architecture and code for web apps using Golang and Angular. Implement JWT and role-based access control effectively.

faq.q: Can the AI draw a full-stack architecture diagram?
faq.a: It can draw one using Mermaid syntax. Append "use mermaid syntax to provide the system architecture diagram (frontend / backend / database / third-party services) and explain each component's role below the diagram." Without specifying syntax it only returns plain text.

faq.q: Is it fine to just build a small project from the AI's plan?
faq.a: For small projects the AI often over-engineers, handing you a Redis / Kafka / Kubernetes stack for a blog. State budget and team size clearly: "1 developer, under 200 USD monthly cost," and the AI will give a minimum-viable architecture. Without this it defaults to big-tech-style designs.
